trans-unit.note: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable GitHub Actions annotations for failed and skipped tests. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable GitHub Actions annotations for failed and skipped tests. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: GitHub Actions 報告產生器可發出工作流程命令，讓測試執行在 GitHub Actions 上產生一流體驗。

trans-unit.note: {0} is the assembly name, {1} is the target framework moniker.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}'. Valid values are 'on' (or 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (or 'false', 'disable', '0').
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 值無效。有效值為 'on' (或 'true'、'enable'、'1') 或 'off' (或 'false'、'disable'、'0')。

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}'. The slow-test threshold must be a positive duration, e.g. '60', '90s', or '2m'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}'. The slow-test threshold must be a positive duration, e.g. '60', '90s', or '2m'.

trans-unit.source: The test failed without providing a failure message.
trans-unit.target: 測試失敗，且未提供失敗訊息。

trans-unit.source: The test was skipped without providing a reason.
trans-unit.target: 已略過測試，但未提供原因。

trans-unit.source: Enable GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: 讓 GitHub Actions 報告產生器可發出工作流程命令，讓測試執行在 GitHub Actions 上產生一流體驗。

trans-unit.note: {0} is the fully qualified test name.
{0} is the fully qualified test name.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable GitHub Actions slow-test notices. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable GitHub Actions slow-test notices. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the fully qualified test name, {1} is the elapsed seconds.

trans-unit.source: The duration a test may run before a GitHub Actions slow-test notice is emitted. Accepts a bare number of seconds or a value with a unit suffix such as '90s', '2m', or '1.5h'. Defaults to 60s.
trans-unit.target: The duration a test may run before a GitHub Actions slow-test notice is emitted. Accepts a bare number of seconds or a value with a unit suffix such as '90s', '2m', or '1.5h'. Defaults to 60s.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file. Valid values are 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: Failed to write the GitHub Actions job summary to '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.target: 無法將 GitHub Actions 工作摘要寫入至 '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the file path, {1} is the error message.
